title: bridelia pustulata
intro: Bridelia pustulata, also known as the black root or bitter bridle, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bridelia pustulata include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as possessing antiviral and antifungal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and ointments.
